zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart於1498年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的父親Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay18歲，母親Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan14歲。她於1520年與Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1550年8月5日在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素享年52歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Mary

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart was born in 1498, in Argyll, Scotland, her father, Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay, was 18 and her mother, Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan, was 14. She married Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief in 1520, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 5 August 1550, in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart est née en 1498, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief en 1520, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 août 1550, à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart 1498 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay 18 und ihre Mutter Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan 14. Sie hat 1520 in Scotland Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. August 1550 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart è nata il nel 1498 nel Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief nel 1520, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 5 agosto 1550, nel Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart(이)가 1498년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1520년 스컷랜드에서 Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 8월 5일 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary MacDonald of Islay, Glens, and Duart родилась в 1498 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hector Mor MacLean 12th. Clan Chief в 1520 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 5 августа 1550 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия.
